name: @para/arrow
description: In-memory columnar tables (Table / RecordBatch / Column), 12 vectorized computes (sum / mean / variance / quantile / argMin / argMax / etc.), Arrow IPC streaming + file formats with hand-rolled FlatBuffers, and Parquet read + write (UNCOMPRESSED / SNAPPY / GZIP). Verified bit-for-bit against pyarrow 21.1.0. Pure JS / Wasm. NOT YET RELEASED — private:true / 0.0.0-dev pending the workspace split.
